---
title: 🇬🇧 Curriculum vitae (CV)
---
You can download the latest CV [here](./Abhinav_CV_21102024_SAMRC.pdf).

<object data="./Abhinav_CV_21102024_SAMRC.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="1200">
  <p>Your browser cannot display PDFs inline. Please use the download link above.</p>
</object>
